payload.source_text: [manual correction] arc-rar means: the archive and rollback bundle layer that packages promoted candidates

payload.source_text: [manual correction] floor model means: the frozen regression baseline every candidate must beat on core capabilities
payload.value: the frozen regression baseline every candidate must beat on core capabilities

payload.source_text: [manual correction] incumbent means: the currently promoted best candidate model

payload.source_text: [manual correction] reflection loop means: the draft-critique-revise pipeline that improves answer quality

payload.source_text: [manual correction] exemplar adapter means: a retrieval-based adapter that matches prompts to training examples
payload.value: a retrieval-based adapter that matches prompts to training examples

payload.source_text: [manual correction] continuity means: preservation of goals, constraints, blockers, and thread state across turns
